ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "program" TEXT /* Academic program the student is enrolled in */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the student */,
  "current_semester" INTEGER /* Current semester of the student */,
  "graduation_year" INTEGER /* Expected graduation year of the student */,
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student's academic advisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey response */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who completed the survey */,
  "problem_type" INTEGER /* Student's preference for problem types (e.g., technical, creative) */,
  "creative" INTEGER /* Student's level of creativity */,
  "outdoors" INTEGER /* Student's preference for outdoor activities */,
  "career" INTEGER /* Student's career aspirations */,
  "group_work" INTEGER /* Student's preference for group work */,
  "survey_date" TEXT /* Date the survey was completed */,
  "survey_type" TEXT /* Type of survey (e.g., career assessment, course evaluation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department offering the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "grade" REAL /* Student's grade in the course */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the course */,
  "drop_date" TEXT /* Date the student dropped the course (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "career_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment result */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who took the assessment */,
  "career_match" TEXT /* Career match based on the assessment results */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date the assessment was taken */,
  "assessment_type" TEXT /* Type of assessment (e.g., personality test, skills assessment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_career_assessments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "liked_courses" INTEGER /* Number of courses the student likes */,
  "disliked_courses" INTEGER /* Number of courses the student dislikes */,
  "join_clubs" INTEGER /* Number of clubs the student wants to join */,
  "not_clubs" INTEGER /* Number of clubs the student does not want to join */,
  "preferred_work_environment" TEXT /* Student's preferred work environment (e.g., team, individual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_preferences_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who completed the project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_type" TEXT /* Type of project (e.g., individual, group) */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the project */,
  "project_grade" REAL /* Grade received for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "liked_projects" INTEGER /* Number of projects the student likes */,
  "disliked_projects" INTEGER /* Number of projects the student dislikes */,
  "project_interests" TEXT /* Student's interests related to projects (e.g., research, development) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_preferences_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "degrees" (
  "degree_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each degree exploration */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "alternate_degree" INTEGER /* Alternate degree the student is exploring */,
  "expensive_equipment" INTEGER /* Level of expensive equipment required for the degree */,
  "degree_interests" TEXT /* Student's interests related to the degree (e.g., research, industry) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("degree_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_degrees_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
